description:
Multi-fragment shelfmark with two documents.

The lower (left) document is a fragment of Hebrew-script accounts, medieval-era or possibly later. Names include Shimʿon, Elishaʿ, Avraham, Mordekhay, and Yosef. The word Hazār recurs repeatedly, possibly the name of the fatehr of some of the people mentioned (e.g. it looks like it says Avraham walad Hazār) or possibly the Persian word for "one thousand" -- needs examination.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בGreek/Coptic Numerals, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
